case_title: SHARAWN LAWS VS. WEST COAST CLEARANCE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-06-2016 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
